relationship.description: Each user may own many sessions; a session is linked to exactly one user
A session can generate multiple audit records (e.g., login, logout, timeout)

metadata.improvements_made: Added explicit primary‑key (PK) and foreign‑key (FK) annotations for all entities, defined FK constraints (SESSION.user_id → USER.user_id, SESSION_AUDIT.session_id → SESSION.session_id), clarified that SESSION_AUDIT is an optional auditing module, suggested indexes on SESSION.creation_time and SESSION.last_access_time for efficient expiration checks, and noted enumeration constraints for principal_attribute and event_type to enforce data integrity.
